title: Cuneiform Tablet #0299: Ur III Census
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Ur III period — a census document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Ur III period — a census document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Ur III period. Census document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records census matters typical of Ur III period administrative or literary practice.
